name.full: SharePoint File Transfer for Copilot Cowork

description.short: Upload files from URLs to SharePoint, browse sites and libraries, manage folders and sharing links.
description.full: SharePoint File Transfer brings server-side file ingestion into Copilot Cowork. Upload files from any public HTTPS URL directly into SharePoint document libraries — small files upload inline, large files (250 MB+) stream in background with resumable chunked uploads. Browse SharePoint sites, document libraries, and folders. Create folders, move/rename items, set metadata columns, and generate sharing links. Backed by a remote MCP server deployed to Azure Container Apps with Microsoft Entra SSO and On-Behalf-Of token exchange for Microsoft Graph.

agentConnectors.description: Upload files from URLs to SharePoint, browse sites and libraries, create folders, set metadata, and generate sharing links via a remote MCP server with Microsoft Entra SSO.
